blockThreshold.title: Block threshold (0–100)
blockThreshold.description: Risk score at or above which navigation is blocked. Default: 65.

reportOnly.title: Report-only mode
reportOnly.description: Log events without blocking. Useful for monitoring before enforcement.

disableBypass.title: Disable bypass button
disableBypass.description: Remove the 'Proceed anyway' option — users cannot bypass warnings.

blockPopups.title: Block drive-by popups
blockPopups.description: Suppress window.open() calls not triggered by a direct user click.

customAllowlist.title: Allowlist
customAllowlist.description: Domains that are never flagged regardless of score.

customBlocklist.title: Blocklist
customBlocklist.description: Domains that are always blocked regardless of score.

reportingEndpoint.title: Reporting endpoint
reportingEndpoint.description: URL to POST audit events to. Leave empty to disable.
